---
name: Security disclosure
about: Stop. Use the private flow.
title: "DO NOT FILE PUBLIC SECURITY ISSUES"
labels: security
---

## Do not file this as a public issue.

Email: smigolsmigol@protonmail.com

Or use GitHub's "Report a vulnerability" button on the affected repo's Security tab.

Acknowledgment SLA: 48 hours.
Critical-fix SLA: 7 days.

If you opened this template by mistake, close it without filling in details.

See [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/smigolsmigol/.github/blob/main/SECURITY.md) for the full policy.
